feat.name: Charmed Life
feat.text: When danger calls, you have a strange knack for coming out on top. You gain a +2 circumstance bonus to the triggering save. If you succeed on the triggering saving throw, you gain panache until the end of your next turn.

traits.name: Swashbuckler
traits.text: This trait indicates abilities from the swashbuckler class.

feat.trigger: You attempt a saving throw, but you haven’t rolled yet.
